action_items.task: Investigate Helix's bulk import: pull the tenant's import logs, look for errors, and check the backup tooling for 200-record restore granularity.
action_items.evidence_quote: Theo: Reza, you have time today? Reza: yeah I can take a look... I'll dig in this afternoon. + Reza: I'll check the backup tooling tonight or tomorrow morning. Theo: do that as part of looking into it. Reza: yeah I'll bundle it in.

action_items.task: Schedule a call with Helix's CTO for tomorrow afternoon (with Theo and Reza available).
action_items.evidence_quote: Theo: we should probably get Helix's CTO on the phone tomorrow. Hana: agreed. I'll set up a call. Probably afternoon, depending on his calendar.

action_items.task: Write a one-pager explanation of what happened (for Hana to send to Helix's procurement).
action_items.evidence_quote: Theo: Reza, after you've finished the investigation, can you write up a one-pager for Hana? Reza: yeah I can do that. I'll have it for you tomorrow afternoon, after the call.

non_commitments.text: Hana sending Helix an update tomorrow
non_commitments.why_not: Hana said she'd 'set expectations for end of day and update them tomorrow if needed' — conditional on Reza's findings, no fixed deliverable.

non_commitments.text: Theo drafting customer-communication language with Hana
non_commitments.why_not: Theo offered ('happy to draft... if you want'), Hana hedged ('I might take you up on that. Let me see what Reza finds first'). Conditional and unconfirmed.

non_commitments.text: Hana checking in with Reza at 4pm
non_commitments.why_not: Internal sync touchpoint, not a tracked deliverable. Reza only said 'works'.
